data.title: Metallus and USW Local 1123 extend contract set to expire on Monday. Leaders in specialty metals.
data.description: In Canton, Ohio on September 25, 2025, Metallus (NYSE: MTUS), a prominent provider of specialty metals, components, and supply chain services, has reached an agreement with the United Steelworkers (USW) Local 1123 to prolong their current contract. The contract was set to expire on Monday, September [specific date not provided].

data.title: Bitcoin weakness affects Strategy Inc. causing MSTR to drop by 15% with its leveraged ETFs plummeting more, such as MST by 29% in 5 days.
data.description: Over the past five days, Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) experienced a challenging period due to selling its own shares to purchase Bitcoin. During this timeframe, MSTR saw a decrease of approximately 15%. The leveraged ETFs linked to MSTR also saw significant declines, with the Defiance Leveraged Long + Income MSTR ETF (NASDAQ: MST) falling around 29% and the Defiance Daily Target 2x Long MSTR ETF (NASDAQ: MSTX) dropping over 28%. The T-Rex 2X Long MSTR Daily Target ETF (BATS: MSTU) also declined by nearly 30%. These ETFs magnify Strategy's daily movements, showcasing the impact of MSTR's actions on the market.

South Korea will open its foreign-exchange market on a 24-hour basis next year and ease restrictions on won trading for non-residents, aiming to attract global investors. The Finance Ministry said the move aligns with President Lee Jae Myung’s push to enhance market transparency,

data.title: Sally's Apizza, a New Haven pizzeria est. in 1938, to open in Dorchester, MA's South Bay Center.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, Sally's Apizza, a renowned New Haven pizza restaurant founded in 1938, is preparing to open its latest branch at the South Bay Center in Dorchester, Boston, Massachusetts. To attend the grand opening event, reservations via OpenTable are required. The new location will be situated at 9 District Avenue in Dorchester.

data.title: HUMAIN reveals Horizon Pro PC at Snapdragon Summit, promising agentic AI advancements worldwide.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia and Maui, Hawaii on September 25, 2025, HUMAIN, a company backed by the PIF, unveiled the HUMAIN Horizon Pro PC. This innovative laptop aims to transform AI personal computing with its full-stack capabilities. The introduction of this groundbreaking device marks a significant development in the global AI landscape.

data.title: Fiserv acquires Smith Consulting Group, expanding advisory services for financial institutions, strengthening support for community banks and credit unions in the US.
data.description: In Milwaukee, Fiserv has revealed the acquisition of Smith Consulting Group, a provider of operational consulting services used by community banks and credit unions across the United States. The acquisition marks a significant move by Fiserv to expand its reach within the financial services industry, particularly among smaller financial institutions. This acquisition underscores Fiserv's commitment to enhancing its service offerings and solidifying its presence in the market. The deal is anticipated to bring in new opportunities and resources for Fiserv, enabling it to serve a broader client base in the financial sector.

data.title: DOGE aiming for $0.27 recovery despite current weakness; technical rebound expected by October 2025.
data.description: The price prediction for DOGE anticipates a target of $0.27 in the upcoming weeks due to oversold conditions as indicated by technical analysis. A critical support level at $0.21 is currently holding, indicating a potential bullish reversal in the near future.

data.title: CTO Realty Growth secures $150M term loan financing, retires $65M term loan due March 2026.
data.description: Winter Park, Florida - September 25, 2025 - CTO Realty Growth, Inc. (NYSE: CTO) announced today the successful closure of $150 million term loan financing. The financing comprises a new $125 million term loan maturing in September 2030 (the “2030 Term Loan”) and a $25 million increase in the Company’s current term loan maturing in September 2029 (the “2029 Term Loan”). The funds were utilized to pay off the $65 million term loan maturing in March 2026, accounting for a significant portion of the Company’s 2026 maturing debt, as well as to decrease the outstanding balance on the Company’s revolving credit facility.

data.title: LifeMD (Nasdaq: LFMD) to join ROTH 4th Annual Healthcare Opportunities Conference on October 9, 2025 in NYC for meetings with investors.
data.description: LifeMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: LFMD), a prominent virtual primary care services provider based in New York, disclosed its involvement in the upcoming ROTH 4 th Annual Healthcare Opportunities Conference scheduled for October 9, 2025, at the Metropolitan Club in New York City. The company's management is set to engage in individual meetings with investors on the same day.

data.title: Concentrix reports Q3 2025 revenue of $2.48B, a 4% increase YoY. Plans to return over $240M to shareholders in 2025.
data.description: Concentrix Corporation reported financial results for Q3 ending August 31, 2025. Revenue was $2.48 billion, up 4.0% from $2.39 billion in the prior year. Operating income was $147.0 million, a decrease from $153.2 million in the previous year. Net income increased significantly to $88.1 million, up from $16.6 million. The company also announced a $0.36 per share quarterly dividend payable on November 4, 2025. They repurchased around 800,000 shares in Q3 at a cost of $42.2 million and plan to return over $240 million to shareholders in fiscal year 2025. Sees strong demand for integrated solutions and adjusted free cash flow expected to be $585-610 million for FY2025. The company's remaining share repurchase authorization at the end of Q3 was $495.1 million.

data.title: Partnership to replant historic apple orchard at William Clarke house to commemorate 250th anniversary of Battle of Princeton.
data.description: In Princeton, New Jersey, the Princeton Battlefield Society (PBS), American Battlefield Trust (ABT), and the State of New Jersey disclosed plans to replant the apple orchard near the William Clarke house to commemorate the 250th anniversary of the Battle of Princeton. This initiative is part of ongoing endeavors to revive the historic site to its appearance on January 13, 1777, the day marking the battle. The orchard, where the armies first made contact, holds significant historical importance and will be restored to its former glory.

data.title: SOL price aiming for $225-230 rebound in 2 weeks despite weak market conditions. Opportunity for investors.
data.description: The price forecast for SOL indicates a possible rebound to the range of $225-230 in the next two weeks, with an opportunity for buying due to oversold conditions despite the prevailing bearish trend.

data.title: Datavault AI gets $150M from Scilex Holding to build supercomputer and launch data exchanges in US.
data.description: Datavault AI, based in Beaverton, Oregon, has recently announced a strategic investment of $150 million from Scilex Holding Company. The investment will be used to develop a supercomputer and establish independent data exchanges.

data.title: JFrog appoints Sigal Zarmi as Board of Directors, effective Nov 1, 2025. Zarmi brings expertise from ADT, GoDaddy, and HashiCorp.
data.description: JFrog Ltd., a leading Liquid Software company and creator of the JFrog Software Supply Chain Platform, revealed the appointment of Sigal Zarmi to its Board of Directors on November 1, 2025. Zarmi brings a wealth of experience as a board member in various transformative companies like ADT, GoDaddy, and HashiCorp. Her background as a CIO and technology executive will be instrumental in propelling strategic enterprise growth for JFrog. This move is set to fortify the company's leadership with Zarmi's proven track record in the industry.

data.title: Vital Farms (Nasdaq: VITL) to attend Telsey Advisory Group Conference on Oct. 8, 2025 in NY with key executives.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Vital Farms, listed on Nasdaq as VITL, disclosed its upcoming participation in the Telsey Advisory Group 2025 Global Consumer & Retail Conference in New York, NY. The event on October 8, 2025, will feature Russell Diez-Canseco, the President and CEO, Thilo Wrede, the CFO, and Brian Shipman, the VP of Investor Relations from the ethically focused Certified B Corporation. Vital Farms executives will engage in 1x1 meetings.

data.title: Dow falls on slim rate-cut odds; Wall Street reacts to surprise GDP & jobless claims. Oracle & Tesla sell-off.
data.description: In today's stock market, the Dow Jones index managed to reduce its losses on Thursday despite initial declines. Investors on Wall Street closely analyzed unexpected figures revealing a significant impact on the GDP and jobless claims. Notably, Oracle and Tesla experienced declines in their stock prices. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation as the Dow falls slightly due to reduced chances of a rate cut. Additionally, selected stocks are weighing down on the S&P 500 index.
